falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,500 with a bullish engulfing candlestick pattern on 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a strong reversal from the supposed bottom pattern, invalidating the HOLD signal by showing clear bullish momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.8% and stays above for 7 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates sustained investor risk appetite contradicting the blowoff score's implied bearish pressure, falsifying the bottom pattern expectation

falsification_conditions.condition: Global equity markets experience a 20% surge in trading volume compared to the 50-day average during the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Massive buying pressure would directly contradict the pattern's implied market exhaustion, proving the current verdict incorrect

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
